verdict: NOT FIXED — prior retry/backoff did not stop real Cloudflare 502; root cause is Node event-loop blockage from monolithic session I/O under load

whyPreviousFixFailed.summary: Lua retry/backoff and 202 fast-path did not prevent upstream timeout when ingest event loop lag reached 6–8s while still doing full 7.9MB JSON flush work
evidence: Roblox still saw TRANSIENT_UPLOAD_BACKOFF status=502 with marker UPLOAD_502_HARDENING_AND_EVOLVED_STONE_QTY_FIX_2026_06_14 loaded
Node logs showed statusCode=202 and rawPersistMs=2–90 while eventLoopLagMs=6878–8249
Cloudflare/tunnel returns HTML 502 when origin does not respond within proxy timeout — not a fake-success path

productionEvidenceBefore.corruptTmpFound: fishit_live_sessions.json.tmp truncated at 5242880 bytes — monolith atomic write interrupted

storageRootCause.contribution: Every upload/heartbeat triggered full-file JSON.stringify+write; site reloadIfChanged re-parsed entire file every 2s; PM2 FISHIT_LIVE_SESSIONS_PATH kept legacy mode active even after code deploy

deployedMitigations.uploadResponse: Response sent before disk flush (beforeDiskFlush=true in logs)
deployedMitigations.shutdown: flushAllLiveSessionsToDisk on SIGTERM/SIGINT before PM2 kill

measurementsAfterMigration.note: Lag dropped from 8249ms to ~356ms immediately after restart; must hold under sustained 60s upload load

stillRequired: 60-minute real Roblox run with zero Cloudflare 502 / FINAL_UPLOAD_FAIL reason=code-502
/tracker closed-and-reopened shows latest upload without manual refresh
Multi-client load test (10–50 accounts) with bounded storage and stable lag
Git commit and push of storage/502 changes (not yet committed)
Confirm legacy monolith stops growing now that sharded mode is active
notMixedWith: Evolved Enchant Stone quantity cap — separate fix commit 7a67fbd (FISHIT_MAX_PERSISTED_ITEMS slice before stone aggregation)
